reasoning: James has shown a strong grasp of practical vocabulary and enjoys engaging with informal topics. Covering 'reisen_orientierung' will allow him to apply his skills in a new context, as it involves discussing travel plans and directions, which are practical and relevant. This also provides an opportunity to reinforce article usage in a different scenario.
opening_approach: Begin with a role-play scenario where James is planning a trip to a German-speaking city. Ask him questions about his travel plans, preferred destinations, and how he would ask for directions.
watch_for: sentence structure when discussing plans or directions
